title: Contact-Net Cohorting: Quarantine Pod Assignment
strategies: color-aware next-fit (baseline): keep one pod open, admit a contact iff its load fits AND it stays within K lineages, else open a fresh pod and never look back (reproduces the evaluator's weak reference)
color-aware first-fit in arrival order: house each contact in the lowest-index open pod that has room and a free lineage slot, reusing earlier gaps but never reordering arrivals

class-aware decreasing-order packing: best-fit-decreasing that prefers pods already holding the contact's lineage, plus a strain-grouped ordering so whole lineages fill a pod's K color slots before spilling

seeded local search / metaheuristics: start from a class-aware constructive layout and relocate/swap contacts (respecting load and K-lineage limits) or run perturb-and-reoptimize restarts to reclaim stranded capacity
